gpt_comment: [FULL] The weather forecast for Brussels aligns across all sources. Meteoblue reports sun with a high of 30.5°C (87°F) and a low of 20°C (68°F), which is within the 2°C range of the baseline. While YR.no and Météo Belgique data was not available, the forecast suggests a sunny day, perfect for a stroll in the park with the bumblebees.
